title: Flintronic Bike Valve Core Set, 6PCS Germany Type Replacement Bike Valve Set Compatible with Wood Dunlop Dutch Bike Tyre, Copper Bicycle Valve Replacement for Flash Valve and Most of Normal Valve
features: High-quality Material: The bike valve core cet is made of durable copper, finely crafted, waterproof, rustproof, and with a long service life. All parts are of high quality workmanship and durable for rugged use so that can protect your bike's valves and cores from dust, dirt, and other debris.

Convenient Tool: The bike valve core accessories are small and handy. It replaces old valve leaks, stops air from old valves, oil compatible, and provides good airtightness. You can easily take them on any ride, won't take up too much space. So you don't have to worry about your bike tires anymore and you can ride your bike with ease and comfort.

Easy to Install: This bicycle valve replacement is easy to install and use, taking only a few seconds. You only need to tighten the bicycle valve adapter and screw it onto the opened valve. All installation steps can be completed without using other tools.

Wide Application: Our bike valve core set is suitable for all normal bicycles with German standard cores, such as city bikes, children's bikes, and mountain bikes. It is compatible with most German bicycle valves, including Dunlop, Dutch, wooden, and conventional valves.

Essential Accessory: The valve core is an essential bicycle tire accessory that prevents air leakage and ensures normal use of the bike. Durable, safe, and reliable. When the valve core the bicycle fails, it is very necessary to have replacement parts on hand so that you don't have to worry about accidents.
description: Features: -Professional Material: The presta valve cores are made of durable copper, finely crafted, waterproof, rustproof, and with a long service life. -Wide Application: Our bike valve core set is suitable for most of bicycles, but it does not work on valves without removable cores. -Note: If you encounter any installation and product problems, please contact us in time, we will provide help at any time. Specification: -Material: Copper -Product Size: 6.*4*1 cm -Product Weight: 30g -Product Color: Black List of Packages: 6 x Bike Valve Core Notice: -Please allow slight measurement deviation due to manual measurement. -Due to different monitors and lighting effects, the actual color of the item may be slightly different from the color shown on the picture. -We are committed to bringing customers a pleasant shopping experience.
